subcodes.first_line: This is a reminder from Us unto them that have believed in God, the Lord of the worlds, that the verses may bring them to remembrance and draw them unto the horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا ذکر من لدنا لمن آمن بالله رب العالمین لتذکره الایات و تجذبه الی الافق
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
